title: Parkside Harmony Rehearsal (With Special Guest Clinician Richard Lewellen!)
description:
We are excited to be back at it this week, guests are always welcome!  We're also proud to have our favorite clinician in for another wonderful session together, Mr. Richard Lewellen! 
For more information including rehearsal agenda and music, email us at: parksideharmony@parksideharmony.org... See you there!
